# MLOps Titanic Project

## Stack
- Python
- FastAPI
- Streamlit
- Pandas
- Scikit-learn
- Docker

## Objective
Predict Titanic passenger survival using RandomForestClassifier.

## Features
- Pclass
- Sex
- Age
- Fare
- SibSp
- Parch
- Embarked

## Target
- Survived

## Rules
- Use clean and modular code
- Handle missing values properly
- Encode categorical variables
- Use train/test split
- Save models with joblib
- Add error handling
- Use reusable functions
- Keep comments minimal
- Use good machine learning practices

## Visualization
- Show survival distribution
- Show correlation heatmap
- Show prediction results
